descriptionShort: Abbott Cup western final game seven between Richmond Sockeyes and Humboldt Broncos scheduled for tonight at Richmond Arena.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes and Humboldt Broncos play game seven of their Abbott Cup western final series on April 29 at Richmond Arena. Humboldt forced the decider with a 4-3 overtime victory, with Mike Gaber scoring the winner. Sockeye coach Orland Kurtenbach cited defensive mistakes. Both teams are already assured spots in the upcoming Centennial Cup tournament.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes and Broncos Set for Game Seven
